title: The Night of June 13
writer: Vera Caspary, Agnes Brand Leahy, Brian Marlow
actors: Clive Brook, Frances Dee, Charles Ruggles
plot: Elna Curry, once a concert pianist, develops an unfounded jealousy of neighbor, Trudie Morrow. Elna who suffers from neurasthenia, believes that Trudie is having an affair with her husband, John, and vows revenge on Trudie. John e...
